positive: A highly stylized and minimalist depiction of a majestic soaring griffin silhouette against a vibrant sunset sky. The griffin should be depicted in a powerful, dynamic pose, with flowing, elegant wings spread wide, suggesting flight and freedom. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, gold, and rich violet, emphasizing strong, contrasting edges and clean graphic lines. The composition must be centered and highly adaptable for repeat or single-placement print on apparel. Cinematic, vectorial art style, strong backlighting creating dramatic silhouettes, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermarks, low detail, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, mutated hands, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, grain, poor composition, cartoonish, photorealism
